scripts.predev: node scripts/sync-content.mjs && paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --silent
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/sync-content.mjs && paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --silent
scripts.prepare: paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --silent && svelte-kit sync
scripts.precheck: node scripts/sync-content.mjs && paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --silent
scripts.verify: node scripts/sync-content.mjs && paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --silent && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && prettier --check . && eslint . && vite build
